event: experienced several acute exacerbations of his disease
escalation of therapy from aminosalicylates to immunomodulators
completed a three-dose induction course of infliximab
treated with IV corticosteroids and another dose of infliximab
computed tomography (CT) showed multiple multi-loculated abscesses
abscesses in the right hepatic lobe
extensive intrahepatic thrombosis of the right portal vein
abscess was initially drained by interventional radiology
cultures were positive for skin flora
cultures were positive for Escherichia coli
repeat wound cultures showed the same organisms
antimicrobial therapy was changed from vancomycin and meropenem to ceftriaxone and metronidazole
repeat CT showed continued improvement in size of the abscesses
therapy was de-escalated to oral amoxicillin-clavulanate
discharged on an amino acid-based formula via nasogastric tube
liver loculations improved and resolved on ultrasonography
normalization of liver enzymes and inflammatory markers
surgical gross pathology showed moderately to severely active chronic pancolitis
mucosa was diffusely tan-red and hyperemic
